serp_results.title: FounderInstitute: World's largest pre-seedstartupaccelerator.
serp_results.snippet: Start-up& Scale-upAdvisor@ Google.TheFounderInstitute is the world’s most proven network to turn ideas into fundablestartups, andstartupsinto global businesses. Since 2009, our structured accelerator programs have helped over 8,900 entrepreneurs raise over 2BN in funding.
